title: LEFT JOIN incorrect when ON clause does not reference right table.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK(age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DOUBLE NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = 1 WHERE COALESCE(o.amount, 0) > 50;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN ON clause missing right table reference
